description: Wiza turns LinkedIn and Sales Navigator searches into verified emails and phone numbers, exporting clean prospect lists straight to your CRM.
overview: Wiza pulls verified emails and direct-dial numbers from LinkedIn and Sales Navigator searches, then exports clean, ready-to-use contact lists into your CRM or outreach tools.
what_is: Wiza is a prospecting tool that converts LinkedIn and Sales Navigator searches into usable contact data. It finds verified emails and direct-dial numbers on demand, checking live sources so the details are accurate when you export them.

It is built for sales, recruiting, and marketing teams that want to go from a LinkedIn list to outreach quickly. Results come back fast and drop neatly into outbound workflows as a prospecting and enrichment source.

Wiza fills in the contact details your CRM and email tools are missing and pushes clean lists straight into them. It is not a CRM or analytics product; it focuses on delivering ready-to-use contact data.
